channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Starmer says Reform’s pledge to restore two-child benefit cap in full is ‘shameful’ – UK politics live
item.description: Reform UK’s Robert Jenrick has announced party’s plans to cut welfare spending Robert Jenrick , Reform UK’s Treasury spokesperson, is giving his speec...

item.title: Belgian investigation into three Jewish men sparks diplomatic row with US
item.description: US ambassador accused of interference after labelling inquiry into suspected illegal circumcisions ‘antisemitic’ A diplomatic row is escalating betwee...

item.title: Zelenskyy says no agreement on key issues in peace talks as he accuses Russia of ‘dragging out negotiations’ – Europe live
item.description: Unresolved ‘sensitive’ issues in peace talks are fate of occupied territories in east Ukraine and Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant The peace talks end...

item.title: CBS accused of ‘corporate capitulation’ amid row over Colbert interview with Democrat – US politics live
item.description: Stephen Colbert said the network told him not to air an interview with a Texas Democrat running for Senate On a recent morning Eric Taylor , city mana...

item.title: Turmoil at US constitution museum as leader exits ahead of 250th anniversary
item.description: Leadership disputes claim of political motive for ousting Jeffrey Rosen, who was praised for non-partisan approach The first and only museum dedicated...

item.title: Plan to increase youth minimum wage could be delayed
item.description: Government sources tell BBC News they could slow down plans to make minimum wage equal across age groups.

item.title: Rescuers search for nine missing skiers after California avalanche
item.description: Forecasters warn that heavy snowfall is likely to continue in the area over the next few days, making rescue efforts more difficult.

item.title: Children injured by NHS can claim damages for lifetime of lost earnings, court rules
item.description: The decision from the Supreme Court, on the case of a child who sustained a brain injury at birth in 2015, could have significant cost implications fo...

item.title: Uefa investigates alleged racist abuse against Real Madrid player during Benfica match
item.description: Benfica claim there is a "defamation campaign" against Gianluca Prestianni after Uefa launched an investigation into claims he racially abused Real Ma...

item.title: 'Defamation campaign' against Prestianni - Benfica
item.description: Benfica claim there is a "defamation campaign" against Gianluca Prestianni after Uefa launched an investigation into claims he racially abused Real Ma...
